title: Magnolia sambuensis

taxonomy: Magnolia sambuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan, China. This species belongs to the genus Magnolia and is closely related to other species such as Magnolia delavayi and Magnolia stellata. The classification of Magnolia sambuensis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Magnoliales.
